TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ronnie_Brewer, title = Ronnie_Brewer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ronnie_Brewer} }

S.FORM: Ronnie Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, Ronnie Brewer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ronnie Brewer sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1985, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, Ronnie Brewer, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ronnie βrewer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ronnie βrewer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
